name: orbit-sentinel-mcp
description: Search 419,000+ space regulatory filings from the FCC, ITU, UNOOSA, and FAA-AST.
long_description: Orbit Sentinel provides 20 tools over 419,000+ LLM-extracted space regulatory filings from the FCC, ITU, UNOOSA, and FAA-AST: semantic search, entity dossiers (filings + SEC + sanctions screening), spectrum-band holdings, launch licenses, filing trends and distributions, and email alerts. A thin open-source (MIT) stdio client of the Orbit Sentinel REST API. Get a free beta API key via magic-link signup at https://console.viventine.com.

api_key.title: Orbit Sentinel API Key
api_key.description: Free beta key via magic-link signup at https://console.viventine.com
